title: Downtown First Friday
description: Monthly downtown celebration with live music, local vendors, food trucks, and community vibes.

title: Vance County Farmers Market
description: Fresh local produce, baked goods, crafts, and more from Vance County growers.

title: Kerr Lake Fishing Tournament
description: Annual bass fishing tournament on Kerr Lake. Cash prizes for top catches.

title: McGregor Hall: Jazz Night
description: An evening of smooth jazz performed by regional artists.

title: Community Yoga in the Park
description: Free outdoor yoga session for all skill levels. Bring your own mat.

title: Library Story Time
description: Weekly story time for children ages 3-6 with songs and crafts.

title: Henderson Spring Craft Fair
description: Local artisans showcase handmade crafts, jewelry, candles, and art.

title: Drag Racing Legends Night
location: East Coast Drag Racing Hall of Fame
description: Meet-and-greet with legendary East Coast drag racers. Stories and memorabilia.

title: Teen Tuesday at the Library
description: Gaming, crafts, and hangout time for teens.

title: Kerr Lake Kayak Tour
description: Guided kayak tour exploring Kerr Lake's coves and wildlife.

title: Henderson Heritage Walk
description: Guided walking tour of historic downtown landmarks and the Ben E. King mural.

title: Vegan Mami Wellness Workshop
description: Plant-based nutrition workshop and cooking demo.

title: Spring Concert Series
description: Regional bands kick off the spring concert series.

title: Downtown Art Walk
description: Local artists display work in downtown storefronts and galleries.

title: Kerr Lake Camping Weekend
description: Organized group camping with campfire cookout and stargazing.

title: Henderson Food Truck Rally
description: Food trucks from across the region converge on downtown.

title: Small Business Saturday
description: Shop local! Special deals from downtown merchants.

title: Teen Anime Club
description: Monthly anime screening and discussion for teens.

title: Corbitt Truck Show
description: Annual display of restored Corbitt trucks built right here in Henderson.

title: Sadie's Live Music Friday
description: Acoustic performance by local musicians at Sadie's.

title: Vance County 5K Fun Run
description: Community 5K run/walk through Fox Pond Park trails. All ages welcome.
